title: zinnia angustifolia var. greggii
intro: Zinnia angustifolia var. greggii, also known as the desert zinnia, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. Herbal preparations of Zinnia angustifolia var. greggii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
